gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country = 'Germany'
pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE c.country = 'Germany';
question: Please give the name of the race held on the circuits in Germany.
